application: When I sit down to map out my career, relationships, or weekend, I often feel confident that my own designs will carry me forward. Yet this proverb reminds me that the ultimate outcome rests in God’s purpose, not my agenda. I need to submit my plans to Him, seeking His direction rather than relying on my own expectations.
prayer: Lord, help me to bring my plans before You and listen for Your guidance. Teach me to trust that Your will prevails over my own schemes. Grant me humility to release control and find peace in Your sovereign plan.
